title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXIII. Jingles.
content:
Fiddle-de-dee, fiddle-de-dee,
        The fly shall marry the humble-bee.
        They went to the church, and married was she,
        The fly has married the humble-bee.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXIII. Jingles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
